title: Elements of Theology: The One and the Many
description: Proclus systematizes Neoplatonism into 211 propositions: from the One, through henads and intellects, to the material world.
introduction: Proclus systematizes Neoplatonism into 211 propositions: from the One, through henads and intellects, to the material world.

translation.text: Every manifold in some way participates in the One. The One is the cause of all things.
